rulings.Case Title: ANNE EVANS ET AL VS. BONNIE MOORE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 15, 2015 line 7. Defendant'S Special Motion To Strike DENIED. Plaintiffs' causes of action do not arise out of protected activity. The Court does not find Defendants' motion to be frivolous. The Court finds that (1) seeking an approval of rejection of the executory agreement; and (2) settlement negotiations in the course of the court proceedings are protected activities. However, (1) breach of contract by refusal to proceed with an option contract; and (2) breach of the settlement agreement reached in the course of the court proceedings are not protected activities. Plaintiff's causes of action 1, 3 and 4 arise out of the latter. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES FERGUSON VS. ANNA GATTI ET AL
